calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-12-2026 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admissions As Admitted
Off Calendar Mar-23-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER DEEMING THE TRUTH OF THE MATTERS SPECIFIED IN PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSION AS ADMITTED

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: the unopposed motion for a deemed-admitted order is granted. Defendant Tung Wai Chan has not responded to the requests for admission served by plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank N.A. and attached as Exhibit 1 to the Lopez Declaration. The matters specified in those RFAs are deemed admitted by defendant. (See Code Civ. Proc., sec. 2033.280, subds. (b), (c).) Wells Fargo does not seek sanctions, but they are mandatory here. (Id., subd. (c).) Defendant shall pay $50 to plaintiff within 30 days of notice of entry of this order. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
